# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy on Self-Hosted Runners

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build script or commands to execute'
        required: true
        default: './scripts/build.sh'
        type: string
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Custom deployment script or commands to execute'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for script execution'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        required: false
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
      runner_label:
        description: 'Self-hosted runner label to target specific machines'
        required: false
        default: 'datacenter'
        type: choice
        options:
          - datacenter
          - datacenter-gpu
          - datacenter-high-mem
      pre_build_dependencies:
        description: 'Commands to install dependencies before build (e.g., npm install, pip install -r requirements.txt)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      notify_on_completion:
        description: 'Send notification on workflow completion'
        required: false
        default: true
        type: boolean

  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
    paths:
      - 'scripts/**'
      - 'src/**'
      - 'deploy/**'

  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  DEFAULT_BUILD_SCRIPT: './scripts/build.sh'
  ARTIFACTS_RETENTION_DAYS: 30
  LOG_LEVEL: 'info'

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Inputs and Environment
    runs-on: [self-hosted, "${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}"]
    outputs:
      build_script: ${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.build_script }}
      deploy_script: ${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.deploy_script }}
      should_deploy: ${{ steps.set-scripts.outputs.should_deploy }}
      run_id: ${{ steps.generate-id.outputs.run_id }}
    steps:
      - name: Generate unique run ID
        id: generate-id
        run: |
          RUN_ID="run-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)-${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}"
          echo "run_id=${RUN_ID}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "::notice::Run ID: ${RUN_ID}"

      - name: Set script parameters
        id: set-scripts
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
            echo "build_script=${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "deploy_script=${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            if [ -n "${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_script }}" ]; then
              echo "should_deploy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            else
              echo "should_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            fi
          else
            echo "build_script=${DEFAULT_BUILD_SCRIPT}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "deploy_script=" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "should_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Validate runner environment
        run: |
          echo "=== Runner Environment Validation ==="
          echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
          echo "OS: $(uname -a)"
          echo "User: $(whoami)"
          echo "Working Directory: $(pwd)"
          echo "Disk Space:"
          df -h . | head -5
          echo "Memory:"
          free -h 2>/dev/null || echo "free command not available"
          echo "Runner Label: ${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}"
          echo "=== Validation Complete ==="

  build:
    name: Execute Custom Build
    needs: validate
    runs-on: [self-hosted, "${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}"]
    timeout-minutes: 120
    env:
      BUILD_RUN_ID: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}
      TARGET_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
    outputs:
      build_status: ${{ steps.build-execution.outputs.status }}
      build_artifacts_path: ${{ steps.build-execution.outputs.artifacts_path }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          submodules: recursive

      - name: Setup workspace
        id: setup-workspace
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Workspace Setup ==="
          echo "Build Run ID: ${BUILD_RUN_ID}"
          echo "Target Environment: ${TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
          echo "Branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          echo "Commit: ${GITHUB_SHA}"

          ARTIFACTS_DIR="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/build-artifacts"
          mkdir -p "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}"
          echo "artifacts_dir=${ARTIFACTS_DIR}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          LOGS_DIR="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/build-logs"
          mkdir -p "${LOGS_DIR}"
          echo "logs_dir=${LOGS_DIR}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "Working directory contents:"
          ls -la

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.npm
            ~/.cache/pip
            ~/.m2/repository
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/go/pkg/mod
            **/node_modules
            **/vendor
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-deps-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/requirements.txt', '**/pom.xml', '**/build.gradle', '**/go.sum', '**/Gemfile.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-deps-

      - name: Install pre-build dependencies
        if: github.event.inputs.pre_build_dependencies != ''
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Installing Pre-Build Dependencies ==="
          ${{ github.event.inputs.pre_build_dependencies }}
          echo "=== Dependencies Installed ==="

      - name: Make build scripts executable
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ needs.validate.outputs.build_script }}"
          if [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
            chmod +x "${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
            echo "Made ${BUILD_SCRIPT} executable"
          fi

          find . -name "*.sh" -path "*/scripts/*" -exec chmod +x {} \; 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Execute custom build script
        id: build-execution
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        env:
          BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
          BUILD_BRANCH: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          BUILD_COMMIT: ${{ github.sha }}
          BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
          BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR: ${{ steps.setup-workspace.outputs.artifacts_dir }}
          CI: true
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="${{ needs.validate.outputs.build_script }}"
          LOGS_DIR="${{ steps.setup-workspace.outputs.logs_dir }}"
          BUILD_LOG="${LOGS_DIR}/build-${BUILD_RUN_ID}.log"

          echo "=== Executing Build Script ==="
          echo "Script: ${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
          echo "Environment: ${BUILD_ENVIRONMENT}"
          echo "Log file: ${BUILD_LOG}"
          echo "Start time: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          echo ""

          set -o pipefail

          if [ -f "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
            bash "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" 2>&1 | tee "${BUILD_LOG}"
          else
            echo "Executing inline commands:"
            eval "${BUILD_SCRIPT}" 2>&1 | tee "${BUILD_LOG}"
          fi

          BUILD_EXIT_CODE=$?

          echo "End time: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

          if [ ${BUILD_EXIT_CODE} -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "status=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "::notice::Build completed successfully"
          else
            echo "status=failure" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "::error::Build failed with exit code ${BUILD_EXIT_CODE}"
            exit ${BUILD_EXIT_CODE}
          fi

          echo "artifacts_path=${{ steps.setup-workspace.outputs.artifacts_dir }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}
          path: |
            ${{ steps.setup-workspace.outputs.artifacts_dir }}/
            ${{ steps.setup-workspace.outputs.logs_dir }}/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACTS_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Upload build logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-logs-${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}
          path: ${{ steps.setup-workspace.outputs.logs_dir }}/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACTS_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    needs: [validate, build]
    runs-on: [self-hosted, "${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}"]
    if: needs.build.outputs.build_status == 'success'
    timeout-minutes: 60
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}
          path: build-artifacts

      - name: Run tests
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        env:
          TEST_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
          CI: true
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Tests ==="

          if [ -f "./scripts/test.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/test.sh
            ./scripts/test.sh
          elif [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "^test:" Makefile; then
            make test
          elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            npm test 2>/dev/null || echo "No npm test script found, skipping"
          elif [ -f "pytest.ini" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            python -m pytest 2>/dev/null || echo "No pytest configuration found, skipping"
          else
            echo "No test configuration detected. Skipping tests."
            echo "To add tests, create a scripts/test.sh file or configure your project's test runner."
          fi

          echo "=== Tests Complete ==="

  deploy:
    name: Execute Custom Deployment
    needs: [validate, build, test]
    runs-on: [self-hosted, "${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}"]
    if: |
      needs.validate.outputs.should_deploy == 'true' &&
      needs.build.outputs.build_status == 'success' &&
      (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' || (github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'))
    timeout-minutes: 60
    environment:
      name: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}
          path: build-artifacts

      - name: Pre-deployment validation
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Pre-Deployment Validation ==="
          echo "Environment: ${DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Commit: ${GITHUB_SHA}"
          echo "Branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"

          if [ "${DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}" = "production" ]; then
            echo "::warning::Production deployment initiated by ${{ github.actor }}"

            if [ "${{ github.ref }}" != "refs/heads/main" ] && [[ "${{ github.ref }}" != refs/heads/release/* ]]; then
              echo "::error::Production deployments are only allowed from main or release/* branches"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

          echo "=== Validation Passed ==="

      - name: Execute custom deployment script
        id: deploy-execution
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}
          DEPLOY_BRANCH: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          DEPLOY_COMMIT: ${{ github.sha }}
          DEPLOY_RUN_ID: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}
          BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/build-artifacts
          CI: true
        run: |
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="${{ needs.validate.outputs.deploy_script }}"
          DEPLOY_LOG="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/deploy-${DEPLOY_RUN_ID}.log"

          echo "=== Executing Deployment ==="
          echo "Script: ${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
          echo "Environment: ${DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
          echo "Start time: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          echo ""

          set -o pipefail

          if [ -f "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" ]; then
            chmod +x "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
            bash "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" 2>&1 | tee "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
          else
            echo "Executing inline deployment commands:"
            eval "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" 2>&1 | tee "${DEPLOY_LOG}"
          fi

          DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE=$?

          echo "End time: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

          if [ ${DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE} -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "status=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "::notice::Deployment completed successfully to ${DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
          else
            echo "status=failure" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "::error::Deployment failed with exit code ${DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE}"
            exit ${DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE}
          fi

      - name: Upload deployment logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-logs-${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}
          path: ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy-*.log
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACTS_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Post-deployment health check
        if: steps.deploy-execution.outputs.status == 'success'
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory || '.' }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Post-Deployment Health Check ==="

          if [ -f "./scripts/health-check.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/health-check.sh
            ./scripts/health-check.sh
          else
            echo "No health check script found at ./scripts/health-check.sh"
            echo "Consider adding one for automated post-deployment verification."
          fi

          echo "=== Health Check Complete ==="

  notify:
    name: Send Notifications
    needs: [validate, build, test, deploy]
    runs-on: [self-hosted, "${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}"]
    if: |
      always() &&
      (github.event.inputs.notify_on_completion == 'true' || github.event.inputs.notify_on_completion == '')
    steps:
      - name: Determine overall status
        id: status
        run: |
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ needs.build.result }}"
          TEST_STATUS="${{ needs.test.result }}"
          DEPLOY_STATUS="${{ needs.deploy.result }}"

          echo "Build: ${BUILD_STATUS}"
          echo "Test: ${TEST_STATUS}"
          echo "Deploy: ${DEPLOY_STATUS}"

          if [ "${BUILD_STATUS}" = "failure" ] || [ "${TEST_STATUS}" = "failure" ] || [ "${DEPLOY_STATUS}" = "failure" ]; then
            echo "overall=failure" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=❌" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [ "${BUILD_STATUS}" = "cancelled" ] || [ "${TEST_STATUS}" = "cancelled" ] || [ "${DEPLOY_STATUS}" = "cancelled" ]; then
            echo "overall=cancelled" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=⚠️" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "overall=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=✅" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Generate workflow summary
        run: |
          cat >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY << 'SUMMARY_EOF'
          ## ${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }} Workflow Summary

          | Property | Value |
          |----------|-------|
          | **Run ID** | `${{ needs.validate.outputs.run_id }}` |
          | **Status** | `${{ steps.status.outputs.overall }}` |
          | **Triggered by** | `${{ github.actor }}` |
          | **Branch** | `${{ github.ref_name }}` |
          | **Commit** | `${{ github.sha }}` |
          | **Environment** | `${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'staging' }}` |
          | **Runner** | `${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}` |

          ### Job Results
          | Job | Status |
          |-----|--------|
          | Build | `${{ needs.build.result }}` |
          | Test | `${{ needs.test.result }}` |
          | Deploy | `${{ needs.deploy.result }}` |

          ### Scripts Executed
          - **Build Script:** `${{ needs.validate.outputs.build_script }}`
          - **Deploy Script:** `${{ needs.validate.outputs.deploy_script || 'N/A' }}`
          - **Pre-build Dependencies:** `${{ github.event.inputs.pre_build_dependencies || 'None' }}`
          SUMMARY_EOF

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Workspace
    needs: [validate, build, test, deploy, notify]
    runs-on: [self-hosted, "${{ github.event.inputs.runner_label || 'datacenter' }}"]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Clean up temporary files
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning up workspace ==="

          if [ -d "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/build-artifacts" ]; then
            rm -rf "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/build-artifacts"
            echo "Removed build-artifacts directory"
          fi

          if [ -d "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/build-logs" ]; then
            rm -rf "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/build-logs"
            echo "Removed build-logs directory"
          fi

          find "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}" -name "*.log" -mtime +1 -delete 2>/dev/null || true

          find /tmp -name "build-*" -user "$(whoami)" -mtime +1 -delete 2>/dev/null || true

          echo "=== Cleanup Complete ==="
